mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alarm_record WHERE device_code = #{deviceCode} AND project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT * FROM alarm_record WHERE alarm_rule_id = #{ruleId} AND project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT * FROM alarm_record WHERE status = #{status} AND project_id = #{projectId}

SELECT time_slot AS `hour`, IFNULL(alarm_count, 0) AS `count` FROM ( SELECT '00:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '01:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '02:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '03:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '04:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '05:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '06:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '07:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '08:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '09:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '10:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '11:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '12:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '13:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '14:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '15:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '16:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '17:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '18:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '19:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '20:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '21:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '22:00' AS time_slot UNION ALL SELECT '23:00' AS time_slot ) AS time_list LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00'), INTERVAL -(MINUTE(create_time) + (HOUR(create_time) % 2)*60) MINUTE), '%H:00') AS slot_time, COUNT(id) AS alarm_count FROM alarm_record ar WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() GROUP BY slot_time ) AS alarm_data ON time_list.time_slot = alarm_data.slot_time ORDER BY time_list.time_slot;

select ar2.point_description as description, count(1) as count from alarm_record ar left join alarm_rule ar2 on ar.alarm_rule_id = ar2.id where ar.project_id = #{projectId} group by ar2.point_description
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alarm_record (alarm_rule_id, device_code, project_id, alarm_time, alarm_level, alarm_message, alarm_value, status, resolve_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{ruleId}, #{deviceCode}, #{projectId}, #{alarmTime}, #{alarmLevel}, #{alarmMessage}, #{alarmValue}, #{status}, #{resolveTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE alarm_record SET status = #{status}, resolve_time = #{resolveTime} WHERE id = #{id}
